bottleneck_analysis.bottleneck: InfiniBand uplink saturation (4 × 200 GB/s ≈ 0.8 TB/s shared across 64 GPUs).
bottleneck_analysis.description: Each rack’s uplinks to the InfiniBand fabric are shared among multiple nodes. When all nodes initiate transfers concurrently, inter-rack links reach saturation, creating temporary congestion and delays in data exchange.
bottleneck_analysis.workload_characteristic: Distributed training phases where multiple nodes within a rack simultaneously exchange gradients or activations with nodes in other racks—typical in pipeline or expert-parallel (MoE) workloads.
